prestazioni: Hyundai Lambda II 3.3L V6 (G6DH) twin-turbo conversion using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifolds by Full-Race Motorsports, and a PTP turbo blanket system for thermal management. Supporting mods include a TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate with 3D-printed Inconel wastegate flanges and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Armytrix with a secondary catalytic converter delete for track use only.

Full carbon-fiber driveshaft and differential upgrade with a Wavetrac limited-slip differential (LSD) paired with a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the front axle, utilizing custom 300M steel axles from DriveLine Systems. The transmission is a reinforced ZF 8HP95X 8-speed automatic with a Punch Powerglide valve body and a custom torque converter by Yank Racing, featuring a 3,800 RPM stall speed and billet internals.

Custom ECU reflash by Syvecs (S8Plus standalone) with a flex-fuel sensor and ethanol-compatible fuel system, including dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can system with integrated oil separator. The cooling system is upgraded with a Setrab 50-row oil cooler and a custom dual-core radiator by CSF Racing, paired with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit for the Essentia Concept, featuring custom carbon-fiber fender flares with integrated LED turn signals, a 3D-printed front splitter with active aerodynamic elements controlled by a Bosch Motorsport ECU, and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny with integrated exhaust outlets for the Armytrix titanium system.

Full carbon-fiber monocoque body panel replacement by AutoClave Industries, including a one-piece carbon-fiber roof with integrated solar cells for auxiliary power, and a custom carbon-fiber hood with a functional NACA duct feeding the Garrett intercoolers. The side skirts are replaced with a custom 3D-printed titanium mesh design by Novitec, featuring integrated air curtains for brake cooling.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), paired with custom billet aluminum control arms by SuperPro with spherical bearings for camber and caster adjustability. The wheels are custom forged 21x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET35 (rear) by HRE Performance Wheels (model FF16), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear) with a custom tire pressure monitoring system by AEM.
